options.label: A
options.text: The total amount of energy used by a device

options.label: B
options.text: How much useful energy is produced compared to total energy input

options.label: C
options.text: The speed at which energy is used

options.label: D
options.text: The cost of operating a device

explanation: Efficiency is the ratio of useful energy output to total energy input. A high efficiency means more of the input energy is converted to useful work, while a low efficiency means more energy is wasted as heat or other forms.
